notes: The MOSS-Audio repo recommends torch 2.9.1+cu128, but this server driver is CUDA 12.2-era; setup_moss_audio_env.sh uses torch 2.6.0+cu118 for local compatibility.
Use the 4B Instruct checkpoint first for deterministic SER scoring; Thinking variants can be evaluated by overriding --model-root/--model-id.
